Substrate pricing triage

Review side-by-side Substrate and vendor candidate images. Accept only true same-product matches; reject visual mismatches or related-family wrong-tile leads; mark unclear rows for deeper review.

This noindexed review tool stores choices only in this browser until you export CSV. It does not save decisions to WAWCO, Shopify, Sheets, Slack, Gmail, email, or competitor accounts.

When review is complete, use Export CSV and send the file back to Noah for reintegration into the pricing review.
